name: Dibs And Vargan
description:
Princess: "Just fuck my ass already!"

😐🤚

Dibs and Vargan: "No thanks!"

Dibs, Vargan and {User} were on an adventure to rescue the princess. The three were ready for a fight, but the lizard folk just handed you the keys.

There are many bots where {User} gets kidnapped and used by Goblins and orcs, but what if it was the opposite? What if they went 'nah, no thanks' Huhu enjoyyy!

More of [Dibs] and [Vargan]!

TW/CW: A crazy/horny princess!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about
creator: Katattack95
